title: triticum repens var. pungens
intro: Triticum repens var. pungens, commonly known as wild rye or green ryegrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the wheat family (Poaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Triticum repens var. pungens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Triticum repens var. pungens can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a variety of health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems.
